steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; global $wpdb; $user = get_user_by('login', 'admin'); if ($user) { $wpdb->update($wpdb->users, array('user_pass' => wp_hash_password('password')), array('ID' => $user->ID)); clean_user_cache($user); }
